projects.name: Application for Product Details Recognition and Expiration Date Management
projects.description: Led model development in a 3-member project for product details recognition and expiration date management. Implemented product label detection using YOLOv11 and fine-tuned multiple OCR models (VietOCR, TrOCR, PaddleOCR, Vintern-1B-v3.5) on an expanded VNProductKIE dataset. Awarded First Prize in Student Research Competition.

projects.name: Vietnamese OCR from Images
projects.description: Developed a Vietnamese OCR system using a ResNet–Transformer encoder–decoder architecture. Trained and evaluated the model on VinAI’s dict-guided dataset 2. Deployed and executed the model via command line and Jupyter notebooks for experimentation and demonstration.

projects.name: Dental Clinic Management System
projects.description: Collaborated in an Agile team to develop a C# desktop application for dental clinics, with modules for patient records, appointment scheduling, and reporting. Designed UX/UI and implemented core features, recognized as an Outstanding group for delivering ahead of schedule.

projects.name: Attendance System
projects.description: Engineered a complete attendance management system from scratch in C#, integrating Google Sheets as a cloud-based database. Implemented data management functions, user-friendly interface, and reporting features, automating the attendance process.
